entries.notes: Legacy /fugu is registered as a deprecated alias. Prototype lane defaults to dry-run safety/plan/check/report with read-only pre-report agents and stops before Worker edits or PR delivery.
Research a question across the web with cross-checked sources. Registered as a builtin command alongside issue-delivery, adversarial-review, and code-review.
Investigate a task, then cross-check each finding with skeptical reviewers. Registered as a builtin command. Supports --evidence and --reviewers/--threshold knobs.
Multi-angle code review with independent verification and synthesis. Registered as a builtin command. Review agents receive only read-only tools.
Summarize workflow cache, cost, context, trace, and compaction telemetry. Registered separately from builtin-commands.ts.

Saved implementation engine promoted from issue-delivery-lc (which remains installed as a local variant). Invoked inline by closed_loop_issue_delivery via workflow('issue_delivery'). Low-cost model routing by default.

Canonical saved workflow is installed. Implementation delegates to the saved issue_delivery engine; no dependence on the deprecated /fugu alias. prototype=true is reserved for explicit harness smoke runs. Normal use remains issue/plan driven.
Canonical saved workflow is installed. Repair should usually run only after an official review finding exists.
Exposes detailed review-depth knobs plus prototype=true mapping for ad-hoc smoke reviews. Explicit knobs override prototype defaults.
Prefer analyzer spelling for canonical name; keep analyser alias because it is already installed.
Source-backed adversarial validation saved workflow. Recorded for operator visibility; external saved workflow contents are local installation state.
Frontend-specific review saved workflow. Recorded for operator visibility; external saved workflow contents are local installation state.

Package-provided in 0.2.3+ and automatically registered through the saved-workflow loader. Project/user definitions may override it. Universal design-system compliance engine using one entrypoint in the app's vendored foundation; JSON args carry app specifics, and red gates block visual verification and delivery. Setup and Gate Contract: docs/workflows/foundation-ui-compliance.md.
